cookie.title: Cookie Consent
cookie.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to provide essential functionality, improve your experience, and analyze site usage. You have the right to accept or reject non-essential cookies.
cookie.essentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled. They include session management and security features.
cookie.functionalDesc: These cookies enable enhanced functionality like remembering your preferences (theme, language) and providing personalized features.
cookie.analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website, allowing us to improve user experience.
cookie.privacy: By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies. You can change your preferences at any time. Read our
